name: 1b-lint-scoped
command: pnpm --filter oando-site exec eslint features/planner/admin/svg-editor/svgPipelineRunner.ts features/planner/open3d/catalog/svg/svgCompiler.server.ts features/planner/open3d/catalog/svg/svgServerSanitizer.ts features/planner/admin/svg-editor/svgReferenceDefinitions.ts features/planner/admin/svg-editor/svgArtifactCompiler.server.ts scripts/generate-svg.mjs --max-warnings 100 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern 'error|warning|svg' | Select -First 10; echo 'LINT_DONE'
